pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh:42 (LIMIT 5 for oldest animals query)
Task description and export_result.sh:33 (SQL query WHERE exit_at::date = '2024-03-01')
Task description states 'via slaughter (abattage)' and task.json metadata confirms 'abattage'
Task description requires 'consolidated sale invoice for the 5 animals' and verifier.py:95-101 mandates sale invoice creation (25 pts criterion and pass threshold logic at line 122)
task_utils.sh:6 (EKYLIBRE_URL environment variable); web search confirms https://demo.ekylibre.farm exists; port 3000 is standard Rails development port
task_utils.sh:8 (ADMIN_EMAIL variable); web search result confirms this is the default Ekylibre admin account email
task_utils.sh:9 (ADMIN_PASSWORD variable); web search confirms this is the default Ekylibre admin account password from github.com/ekylibre/serious database configuration

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the GAEC JOULIN demonstration farm dataset (a real French farm used for Ekylibre demo purposes). The agent must log into an Ekylibre demo instance at http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000 using admin credentials (admin@ekylibre.org / 12345678). The core requirement is to record exits for 5 oldest bovines with exit_date set to 2024-03-01 and exit_reason 'abattage' (slaughter), then create a consolidated sale invoice for the batch. The verifier checks: (1) at least 5 animal exits recorded, (2) exits dated 2024-03-01, (3) at least 1 new sale invoice created, (4) exited animals are among the oldest (born before 2010). Pass threshold is 70 points with minimum 5 recorded exits mandatory.
